title: Hub v2 KeyValueInput
description: Shared input shape for environment variables / headers / source-time secrets. Extracted from the official MCP server.json KeyValueInput definition (https://static.modelcontextprotocol.io/schemas/2025-09-29/server.schema.json#/definitions/KeyValueInput) so models can reuse the same wire shape for source-time credentials (e.g. HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY) as MCP packages do for runtime env.

value.description: Default value for the input. If not set, the user may be prompted to provide a value. If set, end users should NOT be able to override it. Identifiers wrapped in {curly_braces} are replaced by variables[].

description.description: Human-readable description shown to the user in the credential prompt.

isSecret.description: True if the value is a secret (token, password). Clients should handle the value securely (no logging, masked display).

isRequired.description: True if the consumer must collect a value before proceeding (e.g. download cannot proceed without an HF token for a gated repo).

format.description: Input format hint. 'filepath' should be interpreted as a path on the user's filesystem.

default.description: Default value for the input shown in the UI as a placeholder.

choices.description: List of allowed values. If provided, the user must pick one of these.

variables.description: Map of variable names → nested input definitions. Keys in value wrapped in {curly_braces} are replaced with the corresponding variable's resolved value.
